name: forge-vscode
description: One-click remote GPU dev on Vast.ai — connect via Remote-SSH and bootstrap the env from a .forge/ config.

commands.title: Forge: Clean Up Remote (remove env / data / repo)

forge.identityFile.description: Private key used for Vast SSH connections (IdentityFile in ~/.ssh/config).

forge.defaultRemotePath.description: Base remote directory. Repos are cloned to <this>/<repo-name>.

forge.autoBootstrapOnConnect.description: After connecting, automatically run the .forge/ bootstrap on the remote.

enumDescriptions: Forward your local SSH key for the clone (ssh -A). Nothing is stored on the box; falls back to box-key if no local key / relay fails.
Generate a dedicated SSH key on the box and authorize it on GitHub once. Needed for terminal/agent git on images whose tmux strips forwarded credentials.
forge.gitAuth.description: How the box authenticates to GitHub for cloning.
